cancellationPolicy:
• If you need to cancel your booking, please notify us as soon as possible. If you cancel before 48 hours of your scheduled arrival date, you will receive a full refund of the amount paid.


  • If you cancel between 24 hours and 48 hours of your scheduled arrival date, you will receive a 50% refund of the amount paid.


  • Unfortunately, if you cancel within 24 hours of your scheduled arrival date, we will not be able to provide any refund.


  • Please note that this cancellation policy applies to all bookings made at Zo House. We reserve the right to modify or cancel this policy at any time without notice. Thank you for choosing Zo House.
housePolicy:
• Founders have the first right to book rooms, dorms, and event space at Zo House.


  • HQ members and founders have the same privileges, unless the HQ member does not have a founder NFT. In this case, the member will either need to purchase a founder NFT or be considered a non-founder.


  • Founders receive a 50% discount on bookings for rooms, dorms, and event space at Zo House.
  • The living area is a restricted zone. Residents are allowed to call guests into the living area for up to 3 hours at a time. After this time, guests will be charged a fee.
  • Founders do not receive any special privileges when booking event space at Zo House.
  • The event area is only accessible to founders and those who have booked the space for the day.
  • Partners and sponsors may request to visit Zo House, and will be granted access for 1 hour.
  • Any issues related to damage or loss of property should be discussed and resolved between the desk, property manager, and the resident, founder, or visitor involved.
  • Residents are allowed to attend all Zo events for free, but must register in advance.
  • All complaints and special requests should be brought to the attention of the desk and property manager.
  • Zo House does not have a traditional reception area. All inquiries and requests should be directed to the desk and property manager.
  • Designated areas are available for smoking at Zo House. Smoking is not allowed in any other areas.
